notes: Preflight writes a JSON report into the controller run directory.
A missing exp_0227 encoder checkpoint is treated as fallback, not as a blocker.

known_failures.summary: Preflight blocked due to missing assets or insufficient GPU headroom.
suggested_changes: bind the existing cache assets from WavTokenize-feature-analysis
wait for more free GPU memory before launching smoke or short runs
accept fallback to pretrained weights if the exp_0227 checkpoint is missing
